consistency.level: Consistent. Level 2 is appropriate for this core Rogue feature.

quality.completeness: High. Contains standard fields: slug, name, class, level, description, and subclass flag.
quality.readability: High. The description is clear and directly quotes the source material for the feature.

mechanics.core_effect: Grants the ability to use a Bonus Action every turn in combat.
mechanics.options: Restricted to Dash, Disengage, or Hide, which is mechanically correct for Cunning Action.
mechanics.balance_check: This feature is fundamental to the Rogue class identity and power budget at level 2. It is balanced by being restricted to bonus actions and specific combat actions.

analysis.recommendations: No changes necessary. Data is accurate and complete.
